Q11 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Select the correct statements from below:
The root locus for a unity feedback system

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a, b)
The root locus method involves plotting the roots of the characteristic equation (i.e. the closedloop
poles) of the closed-loop system 1 + KG(s) = 0 as the gain “K” varies from 0 to ∞. The root
locus is symmetric about the real axis and not the imaginary axis. Hence, only statements (a) and
(b) are correct.

Q17 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Bode plot of a plant transfer function with unity negative feedback is shown below

 
 
If a lead compensator is added, then system becomes
Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
Lead compensators introduce a phase lead, which effectively increases the phase margin of the
system, making it more stable.
